rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope when bindings depend on subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture structure by only inserting annexes into components or implementations explicitly defined in the source model.
Ensure AGREE annexes respect the scope boundary: component type for port-based assumptions, implementation for bindings tied to subcomponents.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` with double asterisks.
Only reference AADL elements (ports, subcomponents, connections) that are explicitly modeled and visible in the structural extract.
anti_patterns: Do not assume AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) are accessible as variables in AGREE without explicit typed declarations.
Avoid generating range comparisons over Boolean or opaque data ports unless the underlying AADL type is a numeric scalar.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
